data.description:
## What
Enrich the tests overlay prompt with dso content: recall patterns AND FP-guards (both halves), per the
locked principle that domain rubric lives in the overlay, not the generic Pass-2 verifier. Recall: change-detector, tautological, over/under-mocking, source-grepping, existence-only. FP-guards: Four-Criterion test, Rule-5 structural-artifact exception, VALID-patterns-not-to-flag. Base NOT-flag rules do not apply to test-correctness findings. DO THIS FIRST to prove the overlay-authoring + eval pattern before the other five.

## Files
- src/rebar/llm/reviewers/code-review-tests.md
- eval spec + fixtures for the tests overlay (recall + no-fire cases)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests overlay carries both recall patterns and FP-discrimination guards.
- [ ] Lands with a passing recall + no-fire eval; does not over-suppress valid patterns.
- [ ] Overlay remains advisory; no domain rubric leaks into code-review-verify.md.
data.title: tests overlay: full behavioral-testing standard
